# Beatrice - Authenticated Voice Intelligence

Beatrice is a powerful, context-aware AI voice assistant that integrates Google Services (Gmail, Calendar, Tasks, Drive, YouTube), WhatsApp, real-time audio chat, and secure Firestore-backed state synchronization.

## Features
- Real-time voice interaction with high-fidelity low-latency audio.
- Secure user authentication with Firebase Auth.
- Deep integration with Google Workspace.
- Custom WhatsApp messaging and permissions management.
- Dynamic document generation and web search.
